# SPIRENS

> Sovereign Portal for IPFS Resolution via Ethereum Naming Services

A turnkey, modular, educational reference for self-hosting a private Web3
infrastructure stack. Brings up a JSON-RPC endpoint (eRPC), an IPFS/Kubo
HTTP gateway, and an ENS-to-IPFS gateway (dweb-proxy) — all behind Traefik
with wildcard TLS from Let's Encrypt (Cloudflare DNS-01).

**Vibe-coded.** Contributions welcome; limited support.

## Core services

- `https://rpc.example.com` — eRPC JSON-RPC proxy (local-first + vendor fallback)
- `https://ipfs.example.com` — Kubo HTTP gateway (path + `*.ipfs` subdomain)
- `https://*.ipns.example.com` — Kubo IPNS subdomain gateway (mutable names)
- `https://*.eth.example.com` — ENS → IPFS via dweb-proxy
- `https://ens-resolver.example.com` — DoH endpoint for Kubo DNSLink resolution
- `https://traefik.example.com` — Traefik dashboard (auth + IP allowlist)

## Claude Code plugin (spirens-skills)

15 short, triggerable skills that correct LLM blind spots on this stack.
Install inside a Claude Code session:

  /plugin marketplace add MysticRyuujin/spirens
  /plugin install spirens-skills

Skills by domain:

- ship — end-to-end from bare domain to live RPC endpoint (fetch FIRST)
- dns — records, TTL, CAA, propagation
- cloudflare — proxy vs DNS-only, API token scoping
- tls-acme — ACME protocol, DNS-01 vs HTTP-01, wildcards
- lets-encrypt — chain of trust, 90-day renewals, ECDSA vs RSA
- ipfs — Kubo, pinning, peering, DHT vs delegated routing
- gateways — subdomain vs path, trusted vs trustless, origin isolation
- ipns — mutable pointers, dnslink, republish interval
- ens-resolution — ENS → contenthash → CID → gateway
- traefik — routers/services/middlewares, ACME, file vs label provider
- nginx — http/stream, TLS termination, certbot
- caddy — automatic HTTPS, Caddyfile, on-demand TLS risks
- erpc — finality-aware caching, hedging, failover
- helios — a16z trustless light client, eth_getProof requirement, checkpoint trust
- topology — single-host Compose vs Docker Swarm, overlay networks

## Key files

- README.md — quick start and module matrix
- CLAUDE.md — contributor and AI agent guidelines
- SKILL.md — skills table of contents
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json — plugin manifest
- config/erpc/erpc.yaml — eRPC MVP config (< 150 lines by design)
- config/dns/records.yaml — machine-readable DNS record definitions
- compose/single-host/ — Docker Compose topology
- compose/swarm/ — Docker Swarm topology
- src/spirens/ — Python CLI source
